auth.signUpHint: Use at least 10 characters. We'll email you a verification link.
auth.magicLinkTitle: Or get a one-time sign-in link
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.magicLinkFailed: Could not send the link. Try again in a minute.
auth.verifyPendingBody: We've sent a verification link. Click it to activate your account.
auth.errorInvalid: That didn't work. Check your details and try again.
auth.errorBreached: That password has been seen in a breach. Please choose a different one.
auth.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
auth.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.errorUnverified: Please verify your email before signing in.
